headline: TKO Group Holdings (TKO) Is Up 5.8% After Launching US$1 Billion Share Repurchase Program
summary: In early April 2026, TKO Group Holdings announced a US$1.00 billion share repurchase program, including an US$800.00 million accelerated buyback and a US$200.00 million 10b5-1 plan under its existing US$2.00 billion authorization, running through June 2026. This move comes as TKO balances shareholder returns with a financial profile that includes modest interest coverage, an Altman Z-Score near distress territory and a low cash-to-debt ratio, raising questions about how much flexibility the...
